name: Light Point
description: Pinpoint light flickers with focused precision

prompts.SessionStart: precise soft ping ascending with focused bright tone, digital click tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SessionEnd: precise ping descending with focused clean decay, digital click tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.Stop: single clear click with focused bright ring and clean tail, digital click tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PreToolUse: quick precise micro-click with crisp instant attack, digital tick, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PostToolUse: short focused ping confirming with bright clean dot, digital click, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two gentle pings with questioning ascending interval, digital click tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady rhythmic ping pulsing with clear consistent beat, digital click tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStart: single soft ping splitting into two diverging clicks, digital click tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStop: clear returning ping arriving with crisp clean tail, digital click tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
